image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy — Catch fake signups in 1¢
image:image.image:alt: SignupDoggy — Disposable Email, VPN & Tor Detection API. $0.01 per check.
image:image.image:caption: Serverless fraud-detection API for SaaS signup forms

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy API Reference
image:image.image:alt: Full SignupDoggy API reference with curl, Node.js, and Python examples.

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy Pricing
image:image.image:alt: SignupDoggy pricing — $0.01 per fraud-detection API call. Pay once, credits never expire.

image:image.image:title: Free Disposable Email Checker
image:image.image:alt: Free, browser-based disposable email checker. No signup. No API key.

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy Glossary
image:image.image:alt: Plain-English glossary of signup-validation and fraud-detection terms.

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy Alternatives
image:image.image:alt: Compare SignupDoggy with IPQualityScore, MaxMind, Sift, and other fraud APIs.

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy Integrations
image:image.image:alt: Working integration code for Supabase Auth, Cloudflare Workers, Next.js, Node, Python, Django.

image:image.image:title: SignupDoggy Blog
image:image.image:alt: Long-form notes on signup quality, user validation, and shipping anti-fraud infrastructure on a budget.
